adapter_layer.sc_to_ac_initialization: InitAC copies spacecraft configuration, sensor axes, actuator geometry, limits, and controller Init flags from SCType to AcType.
adapter_layer.ac_to_sc_command_mapping: MapCmdsToActuators copies IdealAct, wheel, MTB, and thruster commands from AcType back to SCType actuator objects.
adapter_layer.direct_sc_access_policy: Direct SCType access is restricted to the adapter layer by default. FSW modules should operate on AcType.

current_non_default_or_limited_interface.status: not dispatched by current default shell
current_non_default_or_limited_interface.rule: Plan AcActuators, AcTypes, and 42 joint truth boundary before implementing.
Do not claim native 42 Earth-sensor support from ES alone.
Do not claim native 42 optical payload support unless native truth-model files are implemented.

implementation_rules: Prefer reading and writing AcType inside FSW modules.
Keep direct SCType access in ADCS/src/42fsw.c unless an architecture plan explicitly says otherwise.
Use Tcmd/Mcmd/IdealTrq for attitude torque commands.
Use Fcmd/IdealFrc for translational force commands.
Update AcTypes, initialization, zeroing, actuator mapping, logging, and build wiring when adding new interface fields.
